headline: Williams-Sonoma Collaboration With Hill House Home And What It Means For WSM
summary: Pottery Barn Kids and Pottery Barn Teen, brands under Williams-Sonoma (NYSE:WSM), have launched a new collaboration with Hill House Home. The collection introduces coordinated designs for nurseries, kids rooms, and teen spaces, blending Hill House Home's aesthetic with Pottery Barn's home furnishings. For investors tracking Williams-Sonoma, the collaboration arrives as the stock trades at $175.29. Over the past 3 years, NYSE:WSM has delivered a return of 204.8%, and over 5 years a return of...
